special_mechanics.name: Grab and Throw
special_mechanics.description: Player can approach enemies, grab them, shake them, and throw them back. Throw effects depend on d-pad direction during punch button press.

special_mechanics.name: Sonic Wave Blast
special_mechanics.description: After repeatedly punching grabbed enemies, player can blast them with a sonic wave attack.

special_mechanics.name: Whirlwind Punch
special_mechanics.description: Special throw attack variant executed from grabbed state via directional input.

special_mechanics.name: D. Punch (Special Attack)
special_mechanics.description: Most powerful attack that must be charged via button input. Dizzy effect temporarily after use. Limited use attack.

special_mechanics.name: Standard Punch and Jump
special_mechanics.description: Basic combat actions: punch, jump, and grab mechanics form the core movement system.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): SNES version is a beat 'em up with jump and grab mechanics. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game focuses on combat over platforming precision.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Sonic Blast Man (SNES)
